system.description:
In addition to your regular gear, you have one Signature Weapon. Edit this move on your sheet to record your weapon's details.

Name: _______________   Weapon Type: _______________

Description: _______________

Choose 4 tags from below:

  • ☐ Shoot!
  • ☐ Fight!
  • ☐ Lethal
  • ☐ Non-Lethal
  • ☐ +1 Harm
  • ☐ Concealable
  • ☐ +1 More Harm
  • ☐ Long-Range
  • ☐ Silent
  • ☐ Utility: _______________

You may take 1 drawback to add an additional tag from above:

☐ Loud   ☐ Messy   ☐ Unreliable   ☐ Reload   ☐ Unstable

If you lose your Signature Weapon, you will always get a chance to recover it or to acquire a replacement.
